title: sorbus pyrus
intro: Sorbus pyrus, also known as the rowan or mountain ash, is a deciduous tree species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sorbus pyrus include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Sorbus pyrus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
